name: Bici Bomba Rosario de Agua
description: The Bici Bomba Rosario de Agua is a pedal-powered rope pump for retrieving water from wells.

taxonomy.sub_category: Bici Bomba Rosario de Agua Updated on December 22, 2023 · Created on August 27, 2017 Bici Bomba Rosario de Agua Open-source The Bici Bomba Rosario de Agua is a pedal-powered rope pump for retrieving water from wells. Developed By Bici-Tec Tested By Bici-Tec Content Partners Unknown Info Tags Open-source Snapshot Manufacturing & Delivery Performance & Use Research & Standards Feedback Product Description Bici Bomba Rosario de Agua is a pedal-powered rope pump used to collect water. The machine uses bicycle parts combined with a rope pump to obtain water from beneath, usually hand dug wells. Note: The manufacturer, Bici-Tec does not have a website and is only available on Facebook. Target SDGs SDG 6: Clean Water and Sanitation SDG 1: No Poverty Market Suggested Retail Price $277.00 Target Users (Target Impact Group) Household, Community Distributors / Implementing Organizations Bici-Tec distributes the product directly and works with community leaders to distribute it. Interview with representative Competitive Landscape Direct competitors include BluePump , Vergnet-Hydro 60-2000 Pump , and iDE Rope Pump . Regions Latin America Countries Guatemala, Mexico Manufacturing/Building Method Make to order, the building methods are half artisanal and half industrialized. Intellectural Property Type Open-source User Provision Model Direct from manufacturer, to place an order call Carlos Marroquin at +502 4080 1572 or reach out to the company through their Facebook page. Distributions to Date Status Over 500. Interview with representative Pump type Human-powered pump Power requirement (W) None Average flow rate (L/min at specific head) ~19 L/min at 30 m Maximum head (m) 30 m Diameter (cm) 2.54 cm Design Specifications The product is stationary and pedal powered, it requires no electricity to be operated. It is made from used bicycle parts such as pedals, frame, chains, and handles. The pedaling system is connected to a cement flywheel to facilitate continuous pedaling and uses sprockets’ diameter relation to vary speed and torque. The system is connected to rope which is lowered down into a well and drawn up through a long pipe with the bottom immersed in water. The system also consists of round plastic balls whose diameter matches the diameter of the pipe and which function as a seal that helps pull the water to the surface. Product Schematics Technical Support Bici-Tec trains users at the moment of delivering the product on how to give preventive maintenance. If needed Bici-Tec can also do repairs or provide additional technical support. Interview with representative Replacement Components Available at Bici-Tec and locally available at bike shops. Interview with representative Lifecycle The product can be recycled afterwards, to make more bici maquinas or at a common recycling center since most of the structure is steel. Manufacturer Specified Performance Parameters This product pumps between 5 to 10 gallons of water per minute from a 30 m well. Vetted Performance Status This product pumps about 220 L in 15 minutes (~4 gallons per minute) from a 14 m well. Safety Risk of winding due to exposed rotating components and medium rotational speed. Complementary Technical Systems Bici-Tec teaches, empowers, and encourages people to use pedal powered machines (bici maquinas) through their school Escuela De Bici-Tecnología Apropriada.
